title: Vegan Life
description: Play Minecraft as a vegan. No more meat, fish or wool farming. Just love.
body:
Play as a vegan. By standing on the totem you built, you commit yourself to the path of respect!
Disclaimer This datapack try to make the vegan life style fun and educational. I made it neutral, because this way of life is personnal and only you can chose if you want it or not. So, it is not perfect, and any suggestion is appreciated.
## Main features - Build the totem, and stand on it to become vegan. - Check the ingame advancements pannel for tutorials (default key L). - Respect your convictions : no meat, no fish, no animal stuff! - Leave the vegan mod eating too much meat in a short period of time. - Vegan Crafts: paper feather, hay bed, string and more. - Friends and foes: respect animal, or suffer with them. - Meat eater will have gas for a short period. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkvl:options/get```
Patreon Supporters - **1.21.11 (30/01/2026):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 (01/12/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.5 (2025-07-18):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.2 (2024-11-25):** Delivator, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-07-02):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Aidan McCreary, Azerxim, Setsu-P, Gaming Grotto, Kobe Prokopetz - **1.20.5+ (2024-06-03):** Angelo Russo, 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P - **1.20.4 (2023-12-21):** Delivator, Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **1.20 (2023-06-08):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Phantom-Glitch-Wolf, John Stampe, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie, Deadlot3, Darklad32 - **Adjusments & fixs (2023-05-30):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie - **Easy Totem (2023-01-20):** Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Deadlot3, Samantha Flanary - **1.19 Update (2022-06-25):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, Peter Schubert, Tân Huỳnh - **1.18 Update (2021-12-16):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF - **Mighty Options (2021-09-13):** -
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
